idea-plugin.name: Code Pattern Analyzer
idea-plugin.description:
The #1 Architecture Guardian for AI-Assisted Development

Code Pattern Analyzer is the most comprehensive open-source code quality and architecture analysis plugin for JetBrains IDEs. It acts as a real-time rulebook that catches architectural violations, security flaws, complexity issues, and code smells as you type — whether you code manually or with AI agents (Claude, Copilot, Cursor, etc.).

12 Architectural Patterns

  • MVC, Clean Architecture, SOLID Principles, Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
  • Hexagonal (Ports & Adapters), CQRS, Microservices, Layered Architecture
  • Repository Pattern, Observer/Event-Driven, Factory/Creational, Code Quality

19 Analyzers in One Plugin

  • Architecture — Layer dependency validation, circular dependency detection, coupling analysis
  • Complexity — Cyclomatic (McCabe 1976), Cognitive (SonarSource 2017), Big-O estimation per function
  • Security — OWASP Top 10: SQL injection, XSS, hardcoded secrets, command injection, weak crypto (14 vulnerability types with CWE IDs)
  • Memory & GC — Resource leaks, unbounded caches, string concat in loops, ThreadLocal leaks, GC pressure
  • Thread Safety — Race conditions, deadlock risk, missing volatile, coroutine blocking calls
  • Code Quality — God Class, Feature Envy, dead code, duplicate code, naming conventions
  • API Contracts — REST endpoint validation: missing auth, validation, error handling
  • Call Graph — Function path visualization, hub detection, orphan functions (ASCII/Mermaid/DOT)

AI Agent Integration

  • Run --init to generate .codepattern.md — AI agents read this as their architecture rulebook
  • Run --review or --diff for instant JSON feedback in AI workflows
  • Pre-commit hooks and GitHub Actions for automated quality gates
  • SARIF v2.1.0 output for GitHub Code Scanning integration

Cross-IDE Support

  • JetBrains — Native plugin with real-time inline highlighting
  • VS Code, Vim, Emacs, Sublime — Built-in LSP server
  • CI/CD — CLI with --fail-on error, fitness functions, architecture drift tracking

Key Features

  • Real-time inline highlighting with confidence scores (0-100%)
  • Project health score (0-100) with 12-category breakdown
  • Automated Code Review Gate: PASS / WARN / FAIL verdict
  • HTML, JSON, and SARIF report export
  • Architecture drift tracking with baselines
  • Continuous watch mode for instant feedback
  • Works with 15+ languages: Java, Kotlin, Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Rust, C#, Swift, and more
  • 100% free and open source

Quick Start

  1. Install the plugin
  2. Open any project — pattern is auto-detected
  3. Violations appear inline as you type
  4. Use Tools → Code Patterns for full project scans

GitHub | Report Issues
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • 12 architectural patterns (MVC, Clean Architecture, SOLID, DDD, Hexagonal, CQRS, Microservices, Layered, Repository, Observer, Factory, Code Quality)
  • 19 analyzers: architecture, complexity, security (OWASP), memory, thread safety, code smells, dead code, duplicate code, naming conventions, API contracts, call graphs
  • Real-time inline violation highlighting with confidence scores
  • Automated Code Review Gate with PASS/WARN/FAIL verdicts
  • Big-O time/space complexity estimation per function
  • Security scanner with 14 vulnerability types and CWE IDs
  • LSP server for VS Code, Vim, Emacs, Sublime Text
  • CLI with 30+ flags for CI/CD integration
  • SARIF v2.1.0, JSON, HTML report formats
  • AI agent integration: .codepattern.md generation, pre-commit hooks, GitHub Actions
  • Architecture drift tracking and fitness functions
  • 126 tests, 50 source files, 100% open source

action.description: Run full code review across the entire project
Choose which architectural pattern to validate against
Export violations report as HTML, JSON, or SARIF
Re-analyze only files changed since last commit
Analyze project against multiple patterns simultaneously
Save current scan as architecture baseline for drift tracking
Toggle real-time pattern violation checking as you type
